false_positives.where: src/mech/*.cpp, src/ble/*.cpp, src/app/*.cpp vs (deleted) src/scultpureMode.cpp, src/BLE.cpp, src/main.cpp
false_positives.what_happened: Commit c2e2089 'Create src/app/ module and remove original monolithic source files' decomposed three huge monolith files (scultpureMode.cpp, BLE.cpp, main.cpp) into per-subsystem files under src/mech, src/ble, src/app, src/chess, src/sensors. The 37 reported within/cross-file hits are near-100%% similar because the code was MOVED, not duplicated: the BASE side (monolith) was deleted in the same change. No live duplicate pair exists in the current tree.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: when a near-100%% similar BASE block lives in a file that is DELETED by the same commit (status D in the diff), classify the pair as a code-move/rename rather than copypaste and suppress it. Cross-check the BASE path against the commit's deleted-paths set before emitting a hit.

note: Monolith-split refactor (c2e2089). Detector flags moved code vs its deleted source as duplication. No author copypaste; no cycle (sccs=0).
